creator: junchoon@dec.sakura.ne.jp
text:
Forgot to post the result on main (not using poudriere, but pkg_replace on bare metal environment).

The issue happened again here.
Forcibly rebuilt Qt components as Tatsuki described on comment #64 before everything others.

Next, forcibly rebuilt known-to-be problematic and reproduced audacious[-plugins], without luck. So as vlc. Ommitted libreoffice here, as it't too large to test.

Rebuilt/reinstalled base. Without luck.

Forcibly rebuilt libxkbcommon, then, forcibly rebuilt Qt5 components again, without luck.

What helped this time (not always helps, though) was to move *[Qq]t* under /usr/local/lib/compat/pkg to other directory outside any of libpath.
audacious[-plign], vlc and libreoffice worked fine. Note that libreoffice is not at all rebuilt (delayed updating).
